title: Update – BOSSs Transition to VIRRGIN
text: The International Tax Authority (“ITA”) is updating Registered Agents (“RAs”) on the finalized dates concerning the transition of the Economic Substance (“ES”) filing requirements from the Beneficial Ownership Secure Search system (“BOSSs”) to the Virtual Integrated Registry Regulatory General Information Network (“VIRRGIN”). Please ensure that outstanding filings, reopened declarations, or section 11 Notice requests are submitted before the following dates: 1) BOSSs will be unavailable to Registered Agent after 26th December, 2025; and 2) VIRRGIN will be available for ES filings starting January 2, 2026. See link to previous message here: https://bviita.vg/blog/2025/11/25/bosss-transition-to-virrgin/ Have a query? Email us at info@bviita.vg Visit our website at https://bviita.vg Telephone: 1-284-394-4415
